summary: Comprehensive test suite with excellent coverage of all core requirements (glob patterns, label assignment, deduplication, priority ordering, error handling, workflow structure, and act integration). Well-organized with clear TDD progression across 9 rounds. Strong use of fixtures and test isolation. Minor gaps: no explicit tests for special characters in filenames, Windows path separators, or malformed config structures. Act integration tests validate end-to-end workflow with exact fixture output matching, which is valuable. Relies on external fixture files (fixture-1.json through fixture-4.json, config.json, .actrc) not shown but referenced correctly. Would reliably catch most regressions if all fixtures exist and are properly configured.
